PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-12-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Aaron Bullock (pro per) appeared in person (petitioner).

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated is Oct 20, 2021 admitted to probate. Aaron David Bullock is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for October 15, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status hearing on final inventory and appraisal is set for February 06, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Michael Kasolas is appointed Probate Referee.


Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Wong. Not reported.
